title: Complete Set of 3 Glam Girls Ducks ~ Fabulous Shabby Chic Ornaments
features: Each Duck carries their own little message: "Girls just wanna have funds" "Born to shop" "I'm a luxury few can afford"
Lovely ornaments, best shown in groups. The set includes the complete collection of three fab ducks.
Adorable lady ducks get the attention they deserve. Tongue in cheek humour that never goes out of fashion.
Each duck has a funky but subtle co-ordinating colouring. Shabby Chic style.
Look great grouped together. However, as they are individually boxed, they can be gifted separately too.
description: Lovely girly ornaments that cheer up even the most miserable day. Tongue in cheek humour that never goes out of fashion. Sold as a complete collection, davids ducks are great fun and make for a conversation piece wherever they are sat. Create a gaggle of lady gossiping ducks. Hand painted, shabby chic style. Each duck has a funky but subtle colouring and plaque with a message as shown. These Message Ducks are ideal for window sills or perching on a shelf and would add a touch of shabby chic fun to any room from the bedroom dressing table, living room table to bathroom shelf. They make a great gift. Individually boxed. 15x7cm each x 3.
